title: heligme javanica
intro: Heligme javanica, also known as Java tea or Javanese tea tree, is a plant species native to tropical forests in Indonesia. The leaves and young shoots of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Heligme javanica include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The leaves can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing them in hot water, and they can also be used to make a decoction or tincture for various health benefits.
